narrative:
Fremont City 4-A (precinct in Sandusky County) has 627 registered voters, with 57.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.2%, a modest Republican lean of 5.9 percentage points.
